title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_tag
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_tag' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

message.description: If provided, create an annotated tag with this message. If absent, create a lightweight tag.

ref.description: Commit/ref to tag (default: HEAD). Ignored if `delete` is true.

delete.description: If true, delete the named tag instead of creating it.
